My experience with Android Development

I intend to become a professional Android and Ios developer in a few years . Mainly because i want to master it . I see a lot of potential for this in the DIY robotics space .

RobotCA

This is an app available on the Playstore , It can be used to control a ROS enabled robot effortlessly.
